summary: DHH shares a free download link for Jewel's new single 'Standing Still' available on the WinAmp website in WMA format. He expresses enthusiasm for the upcoming full album. He also notes a coincidence that the album includes a bonus track called 'Grey Matter,' which shares a name connection with someone named Noah Grey.
key_points: Promotes a free full-length Jewel single available for download on WinAmp's site
The track is distributed in 96kbps WMA format, reflecting early 2000s digital music standards
Notes a humorous coincidence between a bonus track title and an acquaintance's name
money_quotes: It's a very nice track; I can't wait for the full album.
key_insight: A brief, casual music recommendation typical of early 2000s personal blogging, with no substantive tech or business commentary.
